ddls:
CREATE TABLE "debates" (
  "debate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each debate */,
  "aff_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the affirmative team */,
  "neg_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the negative team */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the debate (e.g., AFF, NEG) */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "debate_format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the debate format */,
  "debate_round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the debate round */,
  "debate_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the debate */,
  "debate_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the debate */,
  "debate_location" TEXT /* Location where the debate took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("debate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debates_aff_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("aff_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debates_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debates_debate_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("debate_format_id") REFERENCES debate_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debates_debate_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("debate_round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debates_neg_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("neg_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debates_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "debaters" (
  "debater_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each debater */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the debater */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the debater represents */,
  "year_of_study" TEXT /* Year of study of the debater */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the debater */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the debater */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the debater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("debater_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the team represents */,
  "debater1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first debater on the team */,
  "debater2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second debater on the team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_email" TEXT /* Email address of the team */,
  "team_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the team */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* Website of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the school */,
  "school_website" TEXT /* Website of the school */,
  "school_contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email address of the school */,
  "school_contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judges" (
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judge */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the judge */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the judge */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the judge */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the judge */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise of the judge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "debate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the debate */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "points" REAL /* Points assigned to the team */,
  "score_rationale" TEXT /* Rationale provided by the judge for the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_debate_id FOREIGN KEY ("debate_id") REFERENCES debates ("debate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "tournament_website" TEXT /* Website of the tournament */,
  "tournament_contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email address for the tournament */,
  "tournament_contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speakers" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker performance */,
  "debater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the debater */,
  "debate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the debate */,
  "speaker_points" REAL /* Speaker points assigned to the debater */,
  "speaker_position" TEXT /* Position of the speaker (e.g., 1st speaker, 2nd speaker) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speakers_debate_id FOREIGN KEY ("debate_id") REFERENCES debates ("debate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speakers_debater_id FOREIGN KEY ("debater_id") REFERENCES debaters ("debater_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, judge, debater) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "registered_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "debate_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each debate format */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the debate format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the debate format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the round */,
  "round_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the round */,
  "round_location" TEXT /* Location where the round takes place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pairings" (
  "pairing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pairing */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the round */,
  "aff_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the affirmative team */,
  "neg_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the negative team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pairing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pairings_neg_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("neg_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pairings_aff_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("aff_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pairings_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "debate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the debate */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_rationale" TEXT /* Rationale provided by the judge for the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_debate_id FOREIGN KEY ("debate_id") REFERENCES debates ("debate_id")
)
column_names: Result of the debate (e.g., AFF, NEG)
Location where the debate took place
ID of the school the debater represents

ID of the school the team represents
ID of the first debater on the team

Contact phone number of the school

Rationale provided by the judge for the score
Contact email address for the tournament
Contact phone number for the tournament
Unique identifier for each speaker performance
Speaker points assigned to the debater
Position of the speaker (e.g., 1st speaker, 2nd speaker)
Role of the user (e.g., admin, judge, debater)
Date and time the user registered
Unique identifier for each debate format
Location where the round takes place
Rationale provided by the judge for the feedback
